_instructions: Copy this file to /projects/{client_id}/brief.json and fill in all values. Remove _instructions and _optional_sections. Fields marked [OPTIONAL] can be removed if not applicable to the business type.
business_type: healthcare | services | restaurant | agency | ecommerce | consulting
industry: healthcare | digital-agency | restaurant | finance | retail | education | real-estate

benefits.icon_concept: lightning bolt | shield | target | star | palette | smartphone | support | check

_optional_sections._note: Include these sections only if relevant to the business type.

process_steps._when: Required for: agency, consulting, services. Optional for: healthcare. Skip for: restaurant, ecommerce.

comparison._when: Required for: agency, saas, consulting. Optional for: services. Skip for: healthcare, restaurant.

pricing._when: Required for: agency, saas. Optional for: consulting, ecommerce. Skip for: healthcare, restaurant (use contact instead).
